title: supplier_share_breakdown.py output
description: Requires --supplier (always). --component and --project are optional additional filters (--project narrows to one project_number; not validated against the shared commons.py filter set since project isn't a dimension the rest of the skill's scripts support). component_breakdown and criticality_breakdown compare this supplier against the peer set within the same --component/--project scope (everyone else who supplies that scope), not the whole dataset. Only 2 charts are produced (quantity share, spend share), both plotting criticality_breakdown's rows (which already imply the component grouping via the row label) rather than one chart per breakdown level.

component_breakdown.description: One row per component_category, sorted by total_spend descending. A single row when --component was given.

total_days_delayed.description: Sum of days_late across POs where days_late > 0 (early/on-time POs excluded, not counted as negative delay).

qty_share_pct.description: This supplier's % of total peer qty in this component, within the filtered --component/--project scope.

spend_share_pct.description: This supplier's % of total peer spend in this component, within the filtered --component/--project scope.

criticality_breakdown.description: One row per (component_category, component_criticality) combination present in the filtered scope, sorted by total_spend descending. This is what both charts plot.

total_days_delayed.description: Sum of days_late across POs where days_late > 0 (early/on-time POs excluded, not counted as negative delay).

qty_share_pct.description: This supplier's % of total peer qty in this (component, criticality) tier, within the filtered --component/--project scope.

spend_share_pct.description: This supplier's % of total peer spend in this (component, criticality) tier, within the filtered --component/--project scope.
